function.message: Processed the next inbox item and completed the request to OCR all bills related to Badger. I identified four matching purchase records and added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each while preserving the original note body verbatim. Then I deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS files, consulted inbox + OCR + migration workflows and finance schema, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR bills related to Badger. Search in purchases found four files containing related_entity=Badger, and each file had visible bill metadata and line items sufficient to populate all required bill schema fields (record_type, bill_id, alias, purchased_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, lines; plus related_entity). All four records were updated in place with YAML frontmatter and unchanged body content, satisfying migration requirements.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to four matching bill files
